title: FurryRPG
description: A Fun Magic, Tech and many other mods in a fun Modpack!
body:
![BisectHosting Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/b92a7899-6d79-4817-8b2d-41c3e8db84d6.webp)

The FurryRPG is a Modded modpack including many mods including many mods, this modpack contains optimization mods to help with improving fps and lower memory usage, so step into the FurryRPG Modpack and experience a world where technology and gastronomy intertwine in a delightful fusion. This modpack offers a tantalizing blend of cutting-edge gadgets and delectable dishes, inviting you to embark on a journey of innovation and flavor. Whether you're tinkering with futuristic contraptions or whipping up gourmet meals, there's something for everyone in this vibrant world of culinary and technological wonders. Join us and immerse yourself in an adventure where creativity knows no bounds!
